title: [MTR] 300 Series Shinkansen
description: 300 Series Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the 300 Series Shinkansen to the game.

It includes cabs, standard cars, green cars, pantograph cars and electric connector cars.

## Please enjoy it!

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

![300 Series](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e73f90a78ba9f99661b193c17152d0ec7e5c515b.jpeg)
